meta.description: Style family definitions for Spaces theme component rendering
meta.note: These are semantic component family patterns, not framework-specific implementations

desktop-fluent.label: Desktop Fluent
desktop-fluent.description: Microsoft Fluent-inspired desktop shell UI with layered depth and ribbon-like components

componentOverrides.button: fluent-style buttons with command bar integration
componentOverrides.menu: vertical/horizontal command menus with grouped items
componentOverrides.fence: window frame with title bar and system buttons
componentOverrides.icons: segoe-mdl2 or modern weight system icons

colors.depth: uses subtle background gradients and shadow layers
colors.accent: bright primary with complementary hover states

dashboard-modern.label: Dashboard Modern
dashboard-modern.description: Admin dashboard UI with data-dense layouts, metric cards, and responsive grid systems
dashboard-modern.usage: Plugin settings dashboards, analytics views, admin panels

flat-minimal.label: Flat Minimal
flat-minimal.description: Clean, modern interface with minimal ornamentation and generous whitespace

componentOverrides.button: flat primary and ghost with soft hover
componentOverrides.input: ghost input with bottom border only
componentOverrides.menu: minimal vertical menu with subtle separators

colors.depth: flat surfaces with one accent color

flat-minimal.usage: Clean, modern plugin interfaces; focus-driven layouts

soft-mobile.label: Soft Mobile
soft-mobile.description: Mobile-first responsive UI with rounded corners, soft interactions, and touch-friendly targets

characteristics.typography: Large readable text with relative sizing

componentOverrides.button: soft primary with large padding for touch
componentOverrides.input: large text input with soft background

soft-mobile.usage: Responsive layouts, mobile plugin interfaces, touch-optimized controls

cyber-futuristic.label: Cyber Futuristic
cyber-futuristic.description: High-contrast, neon-inspired sci-fi aesthetic with glow effects and bold typography

characteristics.depth: neon glow layering with high contrast
characteristics.density: bold and spacious for visual impact

componentOverrides.card: neon outline card with dark fill
componentOverrides.accent: neon colors with glow blur effects

colors.depth: dark base with neon accent glows
colors.accent: neon cyan, magenta, or lime highlights
colors.surface: pure dark with high contrast surfaces

cyber-futuristic.usage: Gaming overlays, special theme variants, accessibility-focused high-contrast themes

familyApplicationRules.componentSelection: Each component type can select which families support it. For example, buttons support all families, but table layouts primarily support dashboard-modern.
familyApplicationRules.fallback: If a component family doesn't support a requested family, fall back to desktop-fluent as baseline.
familyApplicationRules.runtime: Spaces selects one active family per theme at runtime via appearance.ui.component_family setting.
familyApplicationRules.migration: Existing components continue to work; families are additive, not destructive.
